results.rendered_html:
vi-pra-ṇaś (√2. naś) P. -ṇaśyati, -ṇaśati, to be lost, perish, disappear,  Yājñ. ;  MBh. ;
to have no effect or result, bear no fruit,  MBh.  :
Caus. -ṇāśayati, to cause to be lost or perish,  SaddhP.
